ab: A u taerev ku sapitama’ tu kalavaw, a u erid ku sapiteker tu tikulac, kiya u marucekay isaw.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: Araw mahaen haw, muraraw kaku hani, araci’ awaay ku nilepel nu maku.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: Pasevana’ay tu nu maku kisu, anu maanen ku nipisanga’ tiya tusaan a tatekeran.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: Ayi! Piulah waru! Anu mahaen a awaay aca haw ku nilepelan nu maku.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: Tarakawtu ku rengus nu umah, pialai tu kakawit i alili, tayra kita i umah.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去庫房拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: Icuwa tu saw kira nipatelian a kakawit?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: I tapiingan nu vasulan, cumud han nu misu i alili, mamelaw tu.
ch: A:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: Pisinanuti a miala, matavala, matalem ku kakawit.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: Aka piripa’ tu nipatekeran nu maku.
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱。
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: Icuwa saw ku mipatekeran nu misu?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: Itila i sasa nira kilangan ku nipateker nu maku.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: Kiya makaraheteng hen saw kisu?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: Iratu ku nipatektek tu mamelawen, kiya mavana’ tu kaku i sacuwaan ku nipaeridan nu maku.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: U vuvu kinian, i lilis nu sauwac ku nipateli niyam a mivuting.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: Awaay ku nipavuvu niyam itila, u nipacemut ku sapivuting niyam.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: Nacaay hen pacemut kaku, paseva’en kaku anuruma?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: Hayi! Mahelukunga kita a pacemut tu vuting i rumaan a remiad.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: Pasevana’ay tu nu maku kisu a misanga’ tu vuvu anuruma.
ch: A:那我改天教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: Mananuwang tu ku sapacemut nu misu, simikaenay tu haw nu vuting? suluten tu anini.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!現在要拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: Akahenay, pihaceng ku nikalinalin nu lunan. Itini kaku a misulut tu sapacemut, kaira kisu a mipadang a patudud tu cadiway i takuwan.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: Pasaynien ku nipisulut tu vuting i takuwan, padangay nu maku kisu a misulut.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up

ab: Huvaw! Masevek ku nipivutingan anini a remiad, matuemes tu ku vuvu ita.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: Sakalamkamaw nu mita a taluma’, pavatisay tu ku alumanay.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
